dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HJ 192 IH: Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the Full Accountability in Arrest Reporting Temporary Amendment Act of 2026.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gosar (for himself and Mr. Sessions) submitted the following joint resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the Full Accountability in Arrest Reporting Temporary Amendment Act of 2026.

section.text: That the Congress disapproves of the action of the District of Columbia Council described as follows: The Full Accountability in Arrest Reporting Temporary Amendment Act of 2026 (D.C. Act 26–304), enacted by the Council of the District of Columbia on April 29, 2026, and transmitted to Congress pursuant to section 602(c)(1) of the District of Columbia Home Rule Act on April 29, 2026.
